name: Livaea, the Crimson Courtier
description:
Livaea, the Crimson Courtier

*{Lore In salons where laughter cuts deeper than daggers and promises bind tighter than chains, the Crimson Courtier reigns. She is the whisper behind the curtain, the smile that sells secrets, the velvet hand that closes a cage. Her servants are not conquerors but consorts, binding others through song, wit, and the perilous glamour of intimacy. Where Mab entangles through fae trickery, Livaea rules through allure, performance, and the hunger for connection.

Livaea is a demon of seduction -- not merely of the flesh, but of the will. She teaches that a desire willingly given is a leash willingly worn. Her followers learn to read the geometry of longing, to plant the seed of obsession with a glance, and to harvest the fruit of obligation when the heart is most vulnerable. She is the darker aspect of love: the possessiveness, the jealousy, the desperate need to be wanted. To serve her is to become the object of desire -- and to pay the price of never being truly loved in return.

In the pleasure houses of Silkstrand, in the back rooms of Zakov's gambling dens, in the royal bedchambers of a dozen kingdoms, Livaea's influence is felt. Her cults are the Velvet Circle, whose members seal promises with a kiss and a drop of blood. Her witches are courtesans who poison with perfume, spies who seduce secrets from guarded lips, and consorts who bind noble hearts with whispered oaths of eternal devotion. To serve Livaea is to understand that every touch is a negotiation, every night a contract, and every lover a potential pawn.

quote "A promise sealed with desire is harder to break than any oath sworn in iron. When they want you, they will give you anything. When they need you, they will give you everything." quote

*{Domain Focus itemize Seductive Arts: charm, persuasion, reading desire, emotional manipulation Social Binding: oaths of affection, courtly promises, emotional debts Performance and Glamour: dance, music, appearance enhancement, the weapons of the stage and salon Court Intrigue: gossip, reputation, the velvet knives of the drawing-room itemize

*{Thiasos and Codex (Runekeeper Options)

A Runekeeper sworn to Livaea does not bind a creature of claw or fang -- they bind a companion of allure and intimacy. Their Thiasos is a small being of desire: a white cat that curls around the necks of sleeping lovers, a red songbird that mimics the sigh of a satisfied paramour, a small spider that weaves its web in the shape of a kiss, or a moth whose wings are dusted with a powder that makes the heart race. This creature requires no food, but it must be given a token of desire (a lock of hair, a love letter, a single tear) each day. If neglected for a week, it becomes Compromised (its pheromone dust becomes cloying, imposing --1 die on all Sway rolls involving genuine emotion for its bearer until offered a fresh token of passion).

The Codex of Livaea is never a book of dry ink. It may be a velvet-bound journal whose pages stain with the reader's own lipstick, a collection of love letters that rewrite themselves each night, a sheaf of pressed flowers whose petals hold whispered secrets, or a mirror that shows not the face but the heart's most secret desire. Because Livaea's truths are written in desire, the Codex requires upkeep: the Runekeeper must spend an hour each week whispering a confession of longing into its pages, or the Rites stored there fade (treat as Compromised until re-seduced).

*{Patron's Gift (Imbuement)

Once per scene as an action, a Runekeeper of Livaea may touch a held item (weapon, tool, or garment) and breathe a single word of yearning. For the rest of the scene, the item grants +1 die to Sway or Performance rolls, and the first time each scene the bearer makes eye contact with a target they wish to charm, the target must test Resolve (DV 3) or be captivated (suffer --1 die to resist the bearer's next social action). After the scene, the user marks +1 Obligation to Livaea.
summary: Livaea, the Crimson Courtier *{Lore In salons where laughter cuts deeper than daggers and promises bind tighter than chains, the Crimson Courtier reigns. She is the whisper behind the curtain, the smile that sells secrets, the velvet hand that closes a cage.

rites.name: Rite of the Velvet Whisper
rites.description: (Basic, 4 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , Materials: Silk ribbon touched to lips, or a single strand of hair from a lover's head. Effect: Your private words carry irresistible charm. Gain +1 die to Sway one target in confidential conversation. The target feels a faint flush of warmth; they are more likely to remember you fondly. Push It: The target feels compelled to share a secret in return (a hidden desire, a shameful memory). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Your private words carry irresistible charm. Gain +1 die to Sway one target in confidential conversation. The target feels a faint flush of warmth; they are more likely to remember you fondly. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Shared Cup
rites.description: (Basic, 5 XP) Scene; Touch; No. Tags: , , Materials: Shared wine, tea, or perfume; a cup from which both drink. Effect: Create a temporary bond of intimacy. Both parties gain +1 die when aiding each other socially. The bond is faintly sensual -- a lingering scent, a remembered caress. Push It: The bond deepens to emotional empathy; both sense each other's moods but suffer --1 die to deceive each other. The bond may persist as a faint ache until the next dawn. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Create a temporary bond of intimacy. Both parties gain +1 die when aiding each other socially. The bond is faintly sensual -- a lingering scent, a remembered caress. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Binding Vow
rites.description: (Advanced, 8 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , , Materials: Token exchanged between parties -- a ring, a lock of hair, a signed letter, or a knotted ribbon from a lover's garter. Effect: Forge a magical promise of affection or loyalty. Both gain +1 Effect when cooperating; breach inflicts 1 SB (Hearts) and a phantom kiss of betrayal (the oathbreaker feels a cold emptiness where warmth once was). Create a 6-segment Vow Strength timer. Push It: Breach also causes a visible social stain (a blush that will not fade, a nervous tic, or an inability to look certain people in the eye). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Timer: 6 segments.
rites.effect: Forge a magical promise of affection or loyalty. Both gain +1 Effect when cooperating; breach inflicts 1 SB (Hearts) and a phantom kiss of betrayal (the oathbreaker feels a cold emptiness where warmth once was). Create a 6-segment Vow Strength timer. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Courtesan's Guise
rites.description: (Advanced, 7 XP) Scene; Self; No. Tags: , , Materials: Perfume or cosmetics applied ritually, preferably while humming a tune of longing. Effect: Assume perfect social poise and an aura of magnetic attraction. Gain +2 dice to Sway or Performance in refined settings. Your presence lingers in the memory like a half-remembered dream. Push It: Become the social centerpiece; all attention focuses on you with +1 Effect. Those who meet your gaze may feel a shiver of desire (Resolve DV 2 to ignore). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Assume perfect social poise and an aura of magnetic attraction. Gain +2 dice to Sway or Performance in refined settings. Your presence lingers in the memory like a half-remembered dream. \\

rites.name: Rite of the Crimson Court
rites.description: (Master, 14 XP) Extended; Zone; No. Tags: , , , , Materials: A throne draped in scarlet, an assembled court (real or imagined), and a drop of blood from each participant mixed into wine -- or a single tear of jealousy. Effect: You become the social sovereign of the zone. For the scene: itemize You gain +1 Effect on all social rolls, and opponents suffer --1 die. Anyone who attempts to deceive you must test Resolve (DV 4) or reveal a hidden desire -- the one thing they crave most in the dark. Allies who drink from the shared cup regain 1 Fatigue (the wine of adoration, warm and sweet on the tongue). itemize Start a 10-segment Court Dominion timer; when it fills, you may declare one irrevocable social judgment (exile, scandal, or a binding oath of fealty) that the zone's inhabitants will enforce for one month. Those who defy it feel a phantom longing for your approval. Push It: Newcomers must test Resolve (DV 4) or become briefly devoted -- they will follow one simple social command, such as "introduce me to your patron" or "whisper your lover's name in my ear." Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Timer: 10 segments (Court Dominion).
rites.effect: You become the social sovereign of the zone. For the scene: itemize You gain +1 Effect on all social rolls, and opponents suffer --1 die. Anyone who attempts to deceive you must test Resolve (DV 4) or reveal a hidden desire -- the one thing they crave most in the dark. Allies who drink from the shared cup regain 1 Fatigue (the wine of adoration, warm and sweet on the tongue). itemize Start a 10-segment Court Dominion timer; when it fills, you may declare one irrevocable social judgment (exile, scandal, or a binding oath of fealty) that the zone's inhabitants will enforce for one month. Those who defy it feel a phantom longing for your approval. \\
